field.label: Automatic Blocking
field.help: Enable automatic blocking of detected threats based on configured thresholds

field.label: Progressive Blocking
field.help: Enable escalating response mechanism that increases blocking duration for repeat offenders

field.label: Session Termination
field.help: Automatically terminate active sessions when threats are detected from the same source

field.label: Honeypot Redirection
field.help: Redirect detected attackers to honeypot systems for further analysis and deception

field.label: Tarpit Mode
field.help: Slow down attackers by introducing artificial delays instead of blocking completely

field.label: Notification Webhook URL
field.help: Webhook URL for real-time threat notifications (leave empty to disable)

field.label: SIEM Integration
field.help: Enable SIEM integration for threat intelligence sharing and centralized security monitoring
